target.title: fix(edit): show candidate lines with similarity scores on oldText match failure
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

edit tool returns generic "Could not find the exact text" without diagnostic info when oldText match fails. Users can't tell if it's an escape issue, indentation mismatch, or whitespace difference — forced to blind-guess.

**Root cause**: `getNotFoundError` only emits the file path and generic instructions.

**Fix**: Score each line by Levenshtein similarity to the first line of oldText. Show up to 3 nearest candidates with line numbers and match %. Caps inputs (MAX_LINES=3000, MAX_LINE_LEN=200) to prevent unbounded CPU. Reuses existing `levenshteinDistance` helper.

Closes #97032

## Change Type

- [x] Enhancement

## Scope

- [x] Agents (edit tool diagnostics)

## Evidence

**Before fix**: "Could not find the exact text in test.ts." — no diagnostic info.

**After fix — typo in oldText shows candidate:**
```
Could not find the exact text in test.ts. …newlines.
  near line 2: "function beta() {}" (94% match, check whitespace/indentation)
```

**No false hints when completely different:**
```
Could not find the exact text in test.ts. …newlines.
```
(No candidate lines when all scores < 30%)

**Large file safety**: 5000-line file completes instantly (MAX_LINES=3000 cap).

**Test evidence**: 10/10 new regression tests pass (candidate hint, top-3 sort, threshold suppress, large-file cap, multi-edit). Existing edit tests: 10/10 pass.

**vs PR #97035**: Reuses shared `levenshteinDistance` (not inlined copy), caps all inputs (not unbounded), has regression tests (not zero).

## Security Impact

- New permissions? No
- Secrets handling changed? No
- New network calls? No
